reviews.comment:
Vi mucha mugre en lo que le corresponde a sus instalaciones que no están sobre la av Juan b justo

(Translated by Google)
I saw a lot of filth in the areas belonging to their facilities that are not on Juan B. Justo Avenue.

reviews.comment:
Las aca son las mejores, siempre completas, el playero macanudo, piola. Bajo una estrella porque el tipo que te vende cosas para el auto atendió sin ganas de nada, no le termine comprando nada por la actitud

(Translated by Google)
The gas stations here are the best, always well-stocked, the attendant is great, really cool. I'm taking off one star because the guy selling car parts was completely unenthusiastic; I didn't end up buying anything because of his attitude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtM19IREx3EAE
